sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this NES title

special_mechanics.name: Falcon Control (Cutrus)
special_mechanics.description: Player controls both the protagonist and a fighting falcon simultaneously in single-player mode. Cooperative multiplayer allows one player to control Orin and another to control Cutrus, significantly reducing difficulty.

special_mechanics.name: Sword Swapping System
special_mechanics.description: Each boss defeat grants a new sword that replaces the previous one. Swords have color-matching mechanics where specific sword colors deal increased damage to bosses carrying matching jewel colors.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data: No precise movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information available in public sources. Game described as having Castlevania-inspired gameplay and graphical style. Sources contain only narrative, design, and regional localization details rather than technical physics documentation.
